description: Metadata associated with an OAuth access token
name: AccessTokenMetadata

app_id.description: The ID of the HubSpot application associated with this token

hub_id.description: The HubSpot portal (hub) ID associated with this token

user_id.description: The ID of the user who authorized the token

user.description: The email address of the user who authorized the token

hub_domain.description: The domain of the HubSpot portal

scopes.description: List of scopes granted to this token

expires_in.description: Number of seconds until the token expires
